chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 2039 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 7908/2019. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA 7909/2019. 4. For orders on MA 7910/2019. 5. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2019. Mr. Waheed Ahmed Awan, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. = 1. Granted. 2to5. Petitioner claims to own a House No.78 admeasuring about 8000 square feet situated in Deh 34 Dad Taluka Nawabshah District Shaheed Benazirabad, has filed this petition seeking issuance of writ of prohibition against the alleged harassment of respondents No.2 to 7 who mostly are the revenue officials. However, the petitioner has not alleged any particular incident of harassment caused to her by the said respondents. While reading the papers available in petition, we have noted that one Abdul Hakeem has filed a F.C. Suit before 2nd Senior Civil Judge, Nawabshah against the petitioner and others for multiple reliefs which include his claim over the House No.78 and some area of adjacent plot i.e. plot No.79. The controversy between the parties appears to be factual in nature and there is nothing on record to show that official respondents are causing any harassment to the petitioner. This being the position, we do not find any merit in this petition which is accordingly dismissed alongwith listed applications. The parties are however at liberty to avail their remedy before competent forum in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail/PA
